equations.raw: In NCG: gauge symmetry = Inn(A_F) = inner automorphisms of A_F.
equations.context: which is the GAUGE SYMMETRY of the SM. The algebra A_F is NOT the gauge symmetry -- it's the "internal" coordinate algebra.
